ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Patch Panels, Optical Couplers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category (optional), to support subcategories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Brand A, Brand B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., Light Grey, Silver, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal color code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material (e.g., Stainless Steel, Ceramic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "density_g_cm3" REAL /* Density of the material in g/cm³ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the product */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material of the product */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "packing_unit" TEXT /* Packing unit for the product (e.g., 1 pc., 10 pcs.) */,
  "gtin_ean" TEXT /* GTIN/EAN code for unique identification */,
  "warranty_months" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock update */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level threshold */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in this order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supply_price" REAL /* Supply price of the product from the supplier */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  "moq" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity (MOQ) for this product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this variant belongs to */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color of this variant */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material of this variant */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of this variant in kilograms */,
  "gtin_ean" TEXT /* GTIN/EAN code for this variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
